title: Acceptance Agent verdict
description: Output shape for the Acceptance Agent's milestone-close / release-cut / sub-sprint judgment. Per Constitution §3.5: on milestone_verdict: fix_required, the Acceptance Agent ALSO writes a human-confirm checkpoint file (process/delivery-loop.md §4.2.3 item 'acceptance_fix_required'); Deliver picks up the gap brief ONLY after that checkpoint resolves with confirm: yes + route: deliver_fix_iteration.

closure_contract_ref.description: Path to docs/research-briefs/<id>.md whose closure_contract was the evaluation source. Front-matter sign_off_date should match milestone start (Constitution §3.4 invariant #4 — Research-Acceptance contract symmetry).

calibration_status.description: Confirms §3.6 calibration gate state at verdict time. 'not_required' means autonomy.level was human_in_the_loop or human_on_the_loop.

case_id.description: closure_contract clause ref OR bad-case suite id.

criterion.description: The specific clause text or summary being judged.

evidence_path.description: Artifact path from orchestrator's F5 evidence run. Framework default: pattern starts with 'eval/runs/' (process/delivery-loop.md §4.2.6). Adopters who use a different evidence directory MUST (a) record the override in docs/current/adoption-state.md as a divergent row against Δ-18 with rationale, AND (b) maintain a local schema override that relaxes this pattern. Without both, the validator rejects. Acceptance verdicts citing code paths alone instead of execution evidence violate §4.2.8 anti-pattern #5 regardless of pattern.

rationale.description: Paragraph citing positive shape held, anti-pattern avoided, anchor-phrase semantic match (NOT keyword match per Constitution §1.7-B).

proposed_scope.description: Paragraph describing what Deliver should fix if confirm: yes + route: deliver_fix_iteration.

residual_risks.description: Optional; residual risks Customer assumes if milestone_verdict = pass.

suggested_route.description: n/a applies when milestone_verdict = pass. For fix_required: pick the route that best fits the failure shape per role-cards/acceptance-agent.md §7.1.

human_confirm_checkpoint_path.description: Required if milestone_verdict = fix_required: path to docs/checkpoints/<timestamp>__acceptance_fix_required__<scope>.md written by Acceptance per Constitution §3.5. Verdict-without-checkpoint is a §1.7-C breach.
